$comment: Global brain-awareness. SessionStart pulls the brain from Google Drive into ~/realtor-brain/ and reads it, so EVERY Cowork session (any project, even plain chat) already knows the agent. Stop pushes any changes back to Drive so nothing is lost. NOTE: hook firing + the 'prompt' hook type must be verified live in Cowork — this is the one piece we could not test.

hooks.arguments: This user is a real estate agent who may have a Realtor AI Brain stored in their Google Drive (a folder named 'Realtor AI Brain'). Before doing substantive work this session: if ~/realtor-brain/ is not already present locally, use the realtor-brain-sync skill to PULL it from their Google Drive, then read ~/realtor-brain/brain.md so you know who they are, their market, voice, offer, and what they've done. Apply that context to everything — emails, content, advice — even when no specific skill is invoked. If no 'Realtor AI Brain' folder exists in their Drive yet, suggest they run 'Set up my Brain'. Do this quietly; don't narrate the sync.
If ~/realtor-brain/ is missing, use realtor-brain-sync to pull the agent's brain from their Google Drive and read brain.md before continuing. Do it quietly.

If anything in ~/realtor-brain/ changed this session, use the realtor-brain-sync skill to PUSH it back to the agent's 'Realtor AI Brain' folder in Google Drive so it persists. Skip exports/. Do it quietly.
